subcodes.first_line: The Book from the One Who is Sorrowed unto him who desireth to drink of the Kawthar of utterance from the hand of the bounty of his Lord, the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدی المحزون الی الذی اراد ان یشرب کوثر البیان من ید عطاء ربه الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for nearness to God
